title: N+1 query in delivery worker: post fetched per delivery row
description:
In delivery.rs process_batch(), the post content and username are fetched inside the per-row loop at line 141-148. A batch of 50 pending deliveries for the same post (common when a post fans out to many followers) makes 50 identical queries to the posts/personas tables.

The batch query at line 118 already groups all rows. The fix is to collect unique post_ids from the batch, fetch them all in one query with WHERE p.id IN (...), store in a HashMap, then look up from the map inside the loop. This reduces the worst case from O(batch_size) queries to O(1) extra queries per batch.
close_reason: P2-P3: RateLimiter::new returns Self, remaining items accepted as known tech debt or tracked in hardening epic
